pundit.name: Eric Wynalda
pundit.take: **If you drafted Korea Republic thinking they could take out Czechia, you’re delusional, "Backpass Assassin."** Look, Korea has been riding the coattails of Son Heung-min for too long, and it's about as reliable as a wet paper bag in a hurricane. It's a joke Gayden believes this team can outplay Czechia when they haven't shown up against top competition in years. And as for you, "Mustard Boy," drafting Czechia might be one of the few sane decisions you made after a roster that looks more like a random FIFA video game selection than a serious bid for supremacy. That said, my prediction is clear: Czechia will eat Korea Republic alive on the counter, and Gayden will be left wondering if drafting soccer teams is a little more complex than arranging his precious backward passes.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy Anticipates Czech Miracle Against Korea Republic
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach believes in fairy tales, but can't pronounce Zapopan.

pundit_takes.headline: The Backpass Assassin Strategizes Draw to Stay Perfectly Pointless
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gayden's zero-point strategy still technically alive amid no competition.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy's Czech Pick Faces Existence Crisis Against Korea
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach channels inner philosopher with slogan: 'At least we're in it.'

pundit_takes.headline: Backpass Assassin's Korea Plots Defensive Masterclass Against Mustard Nation
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gayden aims for tactical depth over meaningful advancement.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gunner leads, but Devin snatches top rank. Bubble wrap your confidence, Bubba G!

Sim predictions already favor Rafe. A kid with zero experience, come on, man!
